LanguageData.ABY_InfernalCombatFrame.label: infernal combat frame
LanguageData.ABY_InfernalCombatFrame.description: A first-generation abyssal body frame built for colonies that have stopped treating breach warfare as an experiment. Layered plasteel ribs, residue-lined plating, and a sealed chest-core lattice make it sturdier than improvised combat gear without turning the wearer into a slow-moving shrine. It is the first real torso armor of Abyssal Protocol: disciplined, hostile, industrial, and unmistakably forged for wars that should not exist.
